register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join the CodeClass community
register.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.

landing.description: The platform where teachers create coding challenges and students solve them with instant automatic grading.
landing.tagline: Designed to teach. Built to learn.

challenges.title: Programming Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Test your skills with these algorithmic challenges

challenge.terminal_idle: Run your code to see the result
challenge.tle_cause_2: · Recursion without base case or too many levels
challenge.tle_cause_3: · Algorithm too slow for the input size
challenge.tle_inline: Your code took too long to execute
challenge.presentation_error: Correct output but with extra spaces or newlines

validation.missing_function: Your code must contain the function {name}
validation.signature_intact: The function signature must be exactly: {sig}
validation.no_return: Don't forget to return your solution
validation.timeout: Evaluation took too long. Please try again.

profile.change_name_hint: Update the name shown on your profile
profile.change_password_hint: Use a password of at least 8 characters

ranking.title: Global Ranking
ranking.subtitle: Top 100 · easy 20pt · medium 30pt · hard 40pt · insane 50pt
ranking.empty: No one has solved any challenges yet

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.subtitle: Compete with other students in real time

tournament.available_when_started: Challenges will be available when the tournament starts
tournament.join_to_see: Join the tournament to see the challenges

initiation.name: Initiation Tournament
initiation.description: Welcome tournament with basic exercises. Ideal for beginners. The three exercises are easy but you need to be fast!

algorithms.name: Algorithm Hackathon
algorithms.description: Math and string challenges of varying difficulty. Test your knowledge of logic, recursion, and string manipulation.

spring.name: Spring Tournament
spring.description: The tournament has ended. Check the leaderboard to see the final results.

create_tournament.title: Create tournament
create_tournament.public_hint: Visible in the listing, anyone can join
create_tournament.private_hint: A unique code is generated — only those with it can join
create_tournament.exercises_hint: You can only add hidden (unpublished) challenges created by you
create_tournament.no_exercises: You have no hidden exercises. Create exercises with "Unpublished" to use them in tournaments.

create_exercise.step2_hint: Define the function signature the student will implement
create_exercise.step3_hint: Minimum 2 cases: at least 1 visible and 1 hidden, all complete
create_exercise.short_desc_placeholder: Given two integers, return their sum.
create_exercise.short_desc_hint: Optional. Shown in the challenge list (max {max} chars).
create_exercise.description_placeholder: Given an integer array nums and an integer target...
create_exercise.image_hint: Inserted as markdown: ![text](url). Formats: png, jpg, jpeg, webp, gif, avif. Max width {max}px.
create_exercise.function_name_hint: No spaces. Letters, numbers, _ or -. Minimum {min} characters. No reserved words.
create_exercise.parameters_hint: No spaces, only letters, numbers, _ or -. No reserved words (class, return, def…).
create_exercise.tournament_notice: Tournament challenge — will be saved as hidden. Only visible to participants when the tournament is active.
create_exercise.edit_unpublish_hint: Will no longer appear in the listing after saving
create_exercise.edit_publish_hint: Will appear in the public listing after saving
create_exercise.new_private_hint: Won't appear in the listing until you publish it
create_exercise.publish_warning: To publish: minimum 2 cases, at least 1 visible and 1 hidden, all with complete input and output.
create_exercise.solution_hint: Optional and only visible for internal review
create_exercise.all_hidden_hint: All cases are hidden — the student won't see any examples.
create_exercise.error_min_hidden: There must be at least one hidden case.
create_exercise.error_min_visible: There must be at least one visible case.
create_exercise.error_delete_only_hidden: You cannot delete the only hidden case.
create_exercise.error_delete_only_visible: You cannot delete the only visible case.
create_exercise.error_url_protocol: Only http or https URLs are allowed.
create_exercise.error_url_no_ext: The URL must point to a file with an extension.

my_exercises.title: My Challenges
my_exercises.subtitle: Challenges you have created
my_exercises.empty: You haven't created any challenges yet.

challenge_subs.no_submissions_teacher: No students have submitted solutions yet

progress.title: My Progress
progress.subtitle: Track your activity and performance
progress.no_submissions: You haven't submitted any solutions yet.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.subtitle: Performance of your challenges and student activity

submission_modal.correct_hint: Your code passed all test cases.
submission_modal.msg_0: Don't give up, review your logic from the beginning.
submission_modal.msg_50: Keep trying, you're on the right track.
submission_modal.msg_almost: Almost! There's an edge case you're missing.

auth_modal.title: Restricted access
auth_modal.hint: Sign in to view challenge details and submit your solution.
